title: Ventas: Low Price And Fundamental Growth Beget Value
text: Ventas is a diversified healthcare REIT with growth opportunities and a 4.1% dividend yield, trading at a forward P/FFO of 14.9. The company's senior housing operating portfolio (SHOP) has seen a strong rebound, with cash NOI growing by 17% and occupancy at 81.3%. Long-term growth drivers include a fragmented healthcare real estate industry, an aging population, and reduced competition from higher-leveraged private buyers.

title: Ventas: Blowout Performance From SHOP
text: Ventas had a solid Q1-2023, with SHOP NOI expanding by 17%. The FFO though declined, and we explain why. We think SHOP will do well over the next 12 months as occupancies rise.

title: Here's Why Ventas (VTR) is an Apt Pick for Your Portfolio
text: A rise in healthcare spending by senior citizens, accretive investments in the R&I business and office segment, and a solid balance sheet imply an optimistic near-term scenario for Ventas (VTR).

title: Ventas Realty, Limited Partnership Announces Upsize and Pricing of $750 Million of Exchangeable Senior Notes
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas Realty, Limited Partnership (“Ventas Realty”), a wholly-owned subsidiary of Ventas, Inc. (“Ventas”) (NYSE: VTR), announced today the pricing of $750 million aggregate principal amount of its 3.75% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2026 (the “notes”) in a private placement (the “offering”) to persons reasonably believed to be qualified institutional buyers pursuant to Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (the “Securities Act”). title: Elon Musk Says Home Prices Will Plummet -- But This Type of Real Estate is Practically Minting Money for Investors
text: Musk predicts that housing prices will fall, although some disagree with his view. One area of real estate is proving to be especially resilient.

title: Ventas to Present at Nareit's REITweek 2023 Investor Conference
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) announced today that management will make a presentation regarding the Company at Nareit's REITweek 2023 Investor Conference (the “Nareit Conference”) on June 6, 2023 at 2:15 p.m. Eastern Time. The webcast will be accessible on the Company's website at ir.ventasreit.com/events-and-presentations.
